diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Issues Categories
diagrams.description: Shows the three main categories of capacity planning issues: Technical, Financial, and Organizational with their sub-components
elements: Technical Issues: Infrastructure, Legacy Systems, Scalability, Integration
Financial Issues: Budget Constraints, Cost Optimization, ROI, TCO
Organizational Issues: Skills, Communication, Processes, Coordination
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the broad classification of capacity planning challenges

diagrams.title: Over-Provisioning vs Under-Provisioning Balance
diagrams.description: Illustrates the trade-off between over-provisioning (wasted costs) and under-provisioning (performance issues) with optimal zone in the middle
elements: Under-provisioning zone: Service outages, Poor performance, Lost revenue
Optimal zone: Balanced resources, Cost-effective, Good performance
Over-provisioning zone: Wasted resources, High costs, Low utilization
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the balance required in capacity planning decisions

diagrams.title: Demand Forecasting Challenges
diagrams.description: Shows factors affecting demand forecasting accuracy and their impact
elements: Seasonal variations, Business growth, Market changes,突发需求
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why accurate forecasting is challenging
